html:
A Spider Gland is a healing item dropped by Spiders when killed or a Spilagmite when mined. It restores 8 Health when used by the players or when used on Mobs (including hostile enemies). Spider Glands can be used to craft Healing Salve.

Spider Glands are flammable and turn to Ashes when burnt by Fire.

Downloadable Content

In Reign of Giants, Webber can use 6 Spider Glands, along with 12 Silk and 6 Papyrus, to make Spider Eggs.

Usage

×2

×6

×12

×6

×3

Trivia

  • Spider Glands were added in the Doorway to Adventure update.
  • Prior to the Moderately Friendly Update, the player could use Spider Glands to repair Walls.
  • Looking at WX-78's quote on the Healing Salve and Woodie's quote on the gland itself, it is inferred that the player heals by using the spider's poison to kill harmful bacteria on their wounds.

Gallery

  • Wolfgang using a Spider Gland on Deerclops.
  • Wolfgang using a Spider Gland to repair a damaged section of wall in an older version of the game.

Miscellaneous
"spidergland"
“It has a tangy, antiseptic smell.”
–Wilson
“Eeeeew it's slimy and stinky!”
–Willow
“Squishy and wobbly!”
–Wolfgang
“Even in death, this beast causes pain.”
–Wendy
“I HARVESTED ITS ORGANS”
–WX-78
“This gland secretes a mildly toxic venom.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think it's poison.”
–Woodie
“Distasteful.”
–Maxwell
“Properly processed, this could have medicinal properties.”
–Wagstaff
“Ripped fröm the abdömen öf a slain spider.”
–Wigfrid
“This might sooth our cuts.”
–Webber
“Why does health food taste so bad?”
–Walani
“Alternative medicine.”
–Warly
“I ate worse.”
–Woodlegs
“IS'T HELP'TH WITH BOO BOOS”
–Wilba
“Good for heart”
–Wormwood
“Can't let this gross thing go to waste.”
–Wheeler
“Ha! How indecent.”
–Winona
“It's squishy, yes oh yes it is!”
–Wortox
“Medicine!”
–Wurt
“This would be a good addition to my first aid kit.”
–Walter
“That spider left me a thoughtful parting gift.”
–Wanda
A Spider Gland is a healing item dropped by Spiders when killed or a Spilagmite when mined. It restores 8 Health when used by the players or when used on Mobs (including hostile enemies). Spider Glands can be used to craft Healing Salve.
Spider Glands are flammable and turn to Ashes when burnt by Fire.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In Reign of Giants, Webber can use 6 Spider Glands, along with 12 Silk and 6 Papyrus, to make Spider Eggs.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Spider Glands were added in the Doorway to Adventure update.
Prior to the Moderately Friendly Update, the player could use Spider Glands to repair Walls.
Looking at WX-78's quote on the Healing Salve and Woodie's quote on the gland itself, it is inferred that the player heals by using the spider's poison to kill harmful bacteria on their wounds.
